basis.frozen_panel: panels/shallowswe-grok-4-5-preview.json explicitly identifies the model configuration as high effort.
basis.run_time_default: OpenRouter's Grok 4.5 default reasoning effort at run time was high.
basis.user_confirmation: The benchmark owner confirmed that the omitted request parameter resolved to high.

migration_policy: Set the top-level reasoning_effort field to high on the 54 Grok rows and the run report's last-row summary. Preserve sampling_config.model_kwargs without an explicit effort field to show that the request relied on the provider default.
